jobDescription: Iterable is the growth marketing platform that enables brands to create, execute and optimize campaigns to power world-class customer engagement across email, push, SMS, in-app and more with unparalleled data flexibility. We are an integrated, cross-channel solution— Iterable is built for marketers, trusted by engineers, and designed with intelligence. We know this space well: our product team built the growth systems that powered Twitter’s early success. We've recently raised a $50 M Series C from top-tier investors like Index Ventures and CRV, and hundreds of companies like Zillow, Seat Geek, and Box rely on us to captivate their many millions of users. Iterable's momentum grows daily and there has never been a more exciting time to join the team! We've been recognized as one of the Best Places to Work for two years running, earned ourselves a top 20 spot among the Saa S 1000, and we host an annual growth marketing conference where innovative marketers around the world come to share ideas. We have a nation-wide presence with offices in San Francisco, New York, and Denver, plus we’re expanding internationally as we open an office in London. The Role: Marketing Operations at Iterable is responsible for making sure that Iterable runs an efficient, data-driven, and process-oriented marketing function. As our Marketing Operations lead you will oversee the day-to-day management of our marketing tech stack, drive our database management, and ensure effective, seamless program execution. You’ll work closely with sales operations, demand generation, and the business development team to support a high performance demand generation engine. Position Details: Own our martech stack: Marketo, Iterable, Segment, Engagio and the sync to Salesforce as well as managing the day-to-day operations Manage lead scoring, campaign tracking, and sales handoff processes Own our marketing database and segmentation strategy and implement processes to ensure data quality Partner with Sales/ Sales Ops on system process improvements, weekly and quarterly reporting, and goal setting Drive/build the Nurture demand gen function of the Marketing team Build and scale repeatable business processes to continuously improve operational efficiency and effectiveness Proactively identify and drive analytics to support team performance objectives Drive continuous iteration to support increased funnel efficiency, database engagement, program success, and business direction for the Marketing organization The Ideal Candidate Will Have:3-5 years of experience in marketing operations or a related function Understanding of Account- Based Marketing strategy, segmentation and process Fluent in end-to-end martech ecosystems with a solid understanding of marketing automation systems such as Marketo, Eloqua, or Pardot, bonus points for certification High attention to detail and accuracy despite fast turnarounds A skilled communicator: Transparent, collaborative, and open to feedback Experience defining technical requirements, evaluating technologies, scoping projects, and overseeing implementations Connect multiple data points to report on marketing performance and inform channel and program strategy and execution Support marketing calendar, audience segmentation, build landing pages, forms and email campaigns Document processes and communicate improvements to increase marketing team’s efficiency Google Analytics, Iterable, Engagio, Segment experience a plus Strong team player; demonstrated ability to partner with sales, marketing, finance, and other cross functional departments Proactive and visionary and continually ask, “ How can I make that better” Perks & Benefits: Competitive salaries, meaningful equity, & 401(k) plan Medical, dental, vision, & life insurance Unlimited PTO, great work/life balance, and fantastic location Catered lunches delivered to the office daily + unlimited snacks/beverages Generous monthly Employee Wellness Allowance Professional Development Allowance of $300/quarter Pre-tax commuter benefits
